name: Empty state

en.when_to_use: Use it when a list, search result, project space, or report has no content and needs a centered, clearly toned explanation plus a static next-step cue. It suits finished interfaces and delivery screenshots. If you need to collect input or return a button choice to AI, use a form/action component with uplink instead; for brief loading, use a skeleton or spinner.
en.why_valuable: A bare "No data" message cannot distinguish a successful clear, first use, or no search results, and it lacks a visual anchor. This template combines a themed icon, heading, explanation, and optional static CTA label into a complete state while explicitly avoiding click behavior that would create a dead interaction.

data_in.note: data is one empty-state object. headline is the main message; icon can be an emoji or short graphical text; eyebrow and subtext provide context. cta is a purely static label styled like a button but is not a button, link, or input, binds no events, and has no uplink. ctaNote can explain who performs the next step.

schema.icon?: string -- centered icon, preferably an emoji or short graphic; defaults to ✨
schema.eyebrow?: string -- short state-category label above the heading
schema.headline: string -- primary empty-state heading; displays "Nothing here yet" when empty
schema.subtext?: string -- 1-2 sentences explaining the cause, scope, or next step
schema.cta?: string -- optional static CTA label; button appearance only, with no click or uplink capability
schema.ctaNote?: string -- supporting note below the CTA

spec.note: Minimum height is 360px with centered content; below 520px it shrinks to 330px and tightens spacing. It has no interactions, scrolling, or carrier-size reads.

when_to_use: 需要在列表、搜索结果、项目空间或报告暂无内容时，用一个有明确语气的居中画面解释当前状态并给出静态下一步提示时用它，适合成品界面和交付截图。若需要收集输入或把按钮选择回传 AI，应改用有 uplink 的表单/操作组件；若只是短暂加载，应使用 skeleton 或 spinner。
why_valuable: 一句“暂无数据”无法区分成功清空、首次使用或搜索无结果，也缺少视觉锚点；本模板用主题化图标、标题、说明和可选静态 CTA 标签组成完整状态，同时明确不绑定点击行为，避免制造无效交互。

data_in.note: data 是单个空状态对象。headline 是主信息；icon 可用 emoji 或短图形文本；eyebrow 与 subtext 提供上下文。cta 是纯静态标签，会呈现为按钮视觉但不是 button、link 或输入，不绑定事件也不上行；ctaNote 可说明下一步由谁执行。

schema.icon?: string —— 居中图标，推荐 emoji 或短图形；默认 ✨
schema.eyebrow?: string —— 标题上方的状态类别短标签
schema.headline: string —— 空状态主标题；空值时显示 “Nothing here yet”
schema.subtext?: string —— 解释原因、范围或下一步的 1–2 句文案
schema.cta?: string —— 可选静态 CTA 标签；只有按钮外观，无点击或上行能力
schema.ctaNote?: string —— CTA 下方的补充说明

spec.note: 最小高度 360px，内容居中；520px 以下缩至 330px 并收紧留白。没有交互、滚动或载体尺寸读取。

example._why: “已处理完收件箱”是积极且常见的空状态，图标、状态标签、解释、静态 CTA 和说明都有内容，可完整验证层级与 display-only 边界。

minimal.headline: You’re all caught up
minimal.subtext: Every request has been reviewed. New items will appear here as soon as they arrive.
minimal.ctaNote: Static next-step label · no action is sent to the host

uplink: 纯 display-only 组件，无 uplink；渲染结果只在当前 shadow root 中展示，不向 AI 或宿主回传状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
